Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by exercising it end-to-end and observing behavior — drive the affected flow, not just tests or typecheck. Run before committing nontrivial changes; bootstraps this repo's project verify skill if none exists yet. Don't invoke it on a diff that only touches tests, docs, or other code with no runtime surface to drive (a change to product source always has one) — there's nothing to observe.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

Component-based frame-by-frame animation controller @zh 基於組件的逐幀動畫控制器\\n */\\n@ccclass('FrameAnimation')\\nexport class FrameAnimation extends Component {\\n\\n    //#region Objects\\n    /**@en Target sprite to display frames @zh 目標顯示幀的Sprite */\\n    @property({\\n        type: Sprite,\\n        tooltip: \\\"顯示動畫幀的Sprite組件\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_sprite: Sprite = null;\\n\\n    /**@en tooltip: \\\"是否循環播放動畫\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_isLoop: boolean = true;\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    //#region Properties\\n    /**@en Animation complete delegate @zh 動畫完成委託 */\\n    public private m_isPaused: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /**@en Current frame index @zh 當前幀索引 */\\n    private m_frameIndex: number = 0;\\n\\n    /**@en Total frame count @zh 總幀數 */\\n    private m_totalFrameAmount: number = 0;\\n\\n    /**@en Accumulated play time @zh 累積播放時間 */\\n    private m_playDeltaTime: number = 0;\\n\\n    /**@en Frame interval time @zh 幀間隔時間 */\\n    private m_frameRate: number = 0;\\n\\n    /**@en Component validation cache @zh 組件驗證快取 */\\n    private m_isComponentsValid: boolean = false;\\n    //#endregion\\n\\n    protected onLoad(): void {\\n        if (this.m_frameSpriteFrames && this.m_frameSpriteFrames.length > 0) {\\n            this.m_totalFrameAmount = this.m_frameSpriteFrames.length;\\n        }\\n        this.m_frameRate = 1.0 / this.m_FPS;\\n\\n        // 快取組件驗證結果\\n        this.m_isComponentsValid = this.ValidateComponents();\\n    }\\n\\n    protected onDestroy(): void {\\n        this.ImmediateStop();\\n        this.m_sprite = null;\\n        this.m_frameSpriteFrames = [];\\n        if (this.FinishDelegate) {\\n            this.FinishDelegate.clear();\\n            this.FinishDelegate = null;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    protected onDisable(): void {\\n        this.ImmediateStop();\\n    }\\n\\n    protected update(dt: number): void {\\n        if (!this.m_isPlaying || this.m_isPaused) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_playDeltaTime += dt;\\n\\n        if (this.m_playDeltaTime >= this.m_frameRate) {\\n            this.m_playDeltaTime -= this.m_frameRate;\\n\\n            this.UpdateFrame();\\n\\n            this.m_frameIndex++;\\n            if (this.m_frameIndex >= this.m_totalFrameAmount) {\\n                if (this.m_isLoop) {\\n                    this.m_frameIndex = 0;\\n                } else {\\n                    this.m_isPlaying = false;\\n                    this.FinishDelegate.notify();\\n                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private UpdateFrame(): void {\\n        // 使用快取的驗證結果,避免每幀都檢查\\n        if (!this.m_isComponentsValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 只檢查幀索引範圍(最輕量的檢查)\\n        if (this.m_frameIndex < 0 || this.m_frameIndex >= this.m_totalFrameAmount) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_sprite.spriteFrame = this.m_frameSpriteFrames[this.m_frameIndex];\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Play animation from specified index @zh 從指定索引開始播放動畫 */\\n    public Play(startIndex: number = 0): void {\\n        // 使用快取的驗證結果\\n        if (!this.m_isComponentsValid) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_frameIndex = startIndex;\\n        this.m_isPlaying = true;\\n        this.m_isPaused = false;\\n        this.m_playDeltaTime = 0;\\n\\n        // Display first frame immediately\\n        this.UpdateFrame();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Stop animation @zh 停止動畫 */\\n    public Stop(): void {\\n        this.m_isPlaying = false;\\n        this.m_isPaused = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Immediate stop animation @zh 立即停止動畫 */\\n    public ImmediateStop(): void {\\n        this.m_isPlaying = false;\\n        this.m_isPaused = false;\\n        this.m_frameIndex = 0;\\n        this.m_playDeltaTime = 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Pause animation @zh 暫停動畫 */\\n    public Pause(): void {\\n        if (this.m_isPlaying) {\\n            this.m_isPaused = true;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Resume animation @zh 恢復動畫 */\\n    public Resume(): void {\\n        if (this.m_isPlaying) {\\n            this.m_isPaused = false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Check if animation is playing @zh 檢查動畫是否正在播放 */\\n    public IsPlaying(): boolean {\\n        return this.m_isPlaying && !this.m_isPaused;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Check if animation is paused @zh 檢查動畫是否暫停 */\\n    public IsPaused(): boolean {\\n        return this.m_isPaused;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Get current frame index @zh 取得當前幀索引 */\\n    public GetCurrentFrameIndex(): number {\\n        return this.m_frameIndex;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Get total frame count @zh 取得總幀數 */\\n    public GetTotalFrameCount(): number {\\n        return this.m_totalFrameAmount;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Set animation FPS @zh 設定動畫幀率 */\\n    public SetFPS(fps: number): void {\\n        if (fps > 0) {\\n            this.m_FPS = fps;\\n            this.m_frameRate = 1.0 / this.m_FPS;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Set loop mode @zh 設定循環模式 */\\n    public SetLoopMode(isLoop: boolean): void {\\n        this.m_isLoop = isLoop;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Set sprite frames @zh 設定精靈幀 */\\n    public SetSpriteFrames(frames: SpriteFrame[]): void {\\n        this.m_frameSpriteFrames = frames;\\n        this.m_totalFrameAmount = frames ? frames.length : 0;\\n        // 重新驗證組件\\n        this.m_isComponentsValid = this.ValidateComponents();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@en Set target sprite @zh 設定目標精靈 */\\n    public SetTargetSprite(sprite: Sprite): void {\\n        this.m_sprite = sprite;\\n        // 重新驗證組件\\n        this.m_isComponentsValid = this.ValidateComponents();\\n    }\\n\\n    private ValidateComponents(): boolean {\\n        if (!this.m_sprite) {\\n            console.warn(\\\"FrameAnimation: Target sprite is null\\\");\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (!this.m_frameSpriteFrames || this.m_frameSpriteFrames.length === 0) {\\n            console.warn(\\\"FrameAnimation: No sprite frames available\\\");\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n}\",\"numLines\":233,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":233}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Timeline\\\\TimelineExecutor.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * Timeline Executor — Cocos 3.6.2 整合層\\n * \\n * 使用方式：\\n * 1. 掛在場景節點上\\n * 2. 把所有會用到的 timeline JSON 拖進 timelines 陣列\\n *    — targets 會自動根據所有 JSON 的 targetUuid 填入\\n * 3. Runtime 呼叫 play(index) 或 playByName(name)\\n */\\nimport { _decorator, Component, Node, TextAsset, director, Layers } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport { TimelinePlayer, ClipChangeInfo, PlayerCallbacks } from \\\"./TimelinePlayer\\\";\\nimport { TimelineAsset, EventAction, EventData, TrackData, PlayState } from \\\"./TimelineData\\\";\\n\\ndeclare const CC_EDITOR: boolean;\\n\\nconst { ccclass, property, executeInEditMode } = _decorator;\\n\\n/** 序列化用：trackId → targets 陣列的 index */\\ninterface TrackMapping { trackId: string; targetIndex: number; }\\n\\n@ccclass(\\\"TimelineExecutor\\\")\\n@executeInEditMode\\nexport class TimelineExecutor extends Component {\\n  @property({ type: [TextAsset] })\\n  timelines: TextAsset[] = [];\\n\\n  @property([Node])\\n  targets: Node[] = [];\\n\\n  @property({ visible: false })\\n  private _trackMap: string = \\\"[]\\\"; // JSON string of TrackMapping[]\\n\\n  private player = new TimelinePlayer();\\n  private trackNodeMap = new Map<string, Node>();\\n\\n  onLoad() {\\n    if (CC_EDITOR) this._autoBindTargets();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 播放第 N 個 timeline */\\n  play(index: number = 0): void {\\n    if (index >= this.timelines.length) { console.warn(`[Executor] No timeline at index ${index}`); return; }\\n    this.playTimeline(JSON.parse(this.timelines[index].text!) as TimelineAsset);\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 用 name 播放 */\\n  playByName(name: string): void {\\n    for (const t of this.timelines) {\\n      if (!t) continue;\\n      const asset = JSON.parse(t.text!) as TimelineAsset;\\n      if (asset.name === name) { this.playTimeline(asset); return; }\\n    }\\n    console.warn(`[Executor] Timeline \\\"${name}\\\" not found`);\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 直接傳入 asset 播放 */\\n  playTimeline(asset: TimelineAsset): void {\\n    this.buildTrackNodeMap(asset);\\n    this.player.load(asset, this.buildCallbacks());\\n    this.registerBuiltinActions();\\n    this.player.play();\\n  }\\n\\n  emitSignal(signalId: string): void { this.player.emitSignal(signalId); }\\n  stopTimeline(): void { this.player.stop(); }\\n  onEvent(key: string, handler: (event: EventData) => void): void { this.player.eventBus.on(key, handler); }\\n\\n  get isPlaying(): boolean { return this.player.state === PlayState.Playing; }\\n\\n  update(dt: number): void {\\n    if (this.player.state === PlayState.Playing) {\\n      this.player.tick(dt);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Editor Auto-Bind ──────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private _autoBindTargets(): void {\\n    const scene = director.getScene() as unknown as Node;\\n    if (!scene) return;\\n\\n    const nodeMap = new Map<string, { node: Node; index: number }>(); // uuid → { node, index in targets }\\n    const newTargets: Node[] = [];\\n    const mappings: TrackMapping[] = [];\\n\\n    for (const textAsset of this.timelines) {\\n      if (!textAsset) continue;\\n      const asset = JSON.parse(textAsset.text!) as any;\\n      if (!asset?.tracks) continue;\\n\\n      for (const track of asset.tracks) {\\n        const uuid = track.targetUuid;\\n        if (!uuid) continue;\\n\\n        // 同一個 uuid 只存一次（多個 track 可能指向同一個節點）\\n        if (!nodeMap.has(uuid)) {\\n          const node = this._findByUuid(scene, uuid);\\n          if (node) {\\n            const idx = newTargets.length;\\n            newTargets.push(node);\\n            nodeMap.set(uuid, { node, index: idx });\\n          } else {\\n            console.warn(`[Executor] Auto-bind: uuid \\\"${uuid}\\\" not found (track \\\"${track.id}\\\")`);\\n            continue;\\n          }\\n        }\\n        mappings.push({ trackId: track.id, targetIndex: nodeMap.get(uuid)!.index });\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    this.targets = newTargets;\\n    this._trackMap = JSON.stringify(mappings);\\n    console.log(`[Executor] Auto-bound ${newTargets.length} targets, ${mappings.length} track mappings`);\\n  }\\n\\n  private _findByUuid(root: Node, uuid: string): Node | null {\\n    if ((root as any).uuid === uuid) return root;\\n    for (const child of root.children) {\\n      const found = this._findByUuid(child, uuid);\\n      if (found) return found;\\n    }\\n    return null;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Built-in Event Actions ─────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private registerBuiltinActions(): void {\\n    const actions: EventAction[] = [\\\"change_layer\\\", \\\"set_active\\\", \\\"set_scale\\\", \\\"play_anim\\\"];\\n    for (const action of actions) {\\n      this.player.eventBus.onAction(action, (ev) => this.handleEvent(ev));\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * 內建 action 自動執行。params 約定：\\n   * - target: trackId (string) 指定目標節點\\n   * - change_layer: { target, layer: number }\\n   * - set_active:   { target, active: boolean }\\n   * - set_scale:    { target, x?, y?, z? } (預設 1)\\n   * - play_anim:    { target, anim: string, trackIndex?: number, loop?: boolean }\\n   */\\n  private handleEvent(ev: EventData): void {\\n    const node = this.resolveEventTarget(ev);\\n    if (!node) { console.warn(`[Executor] Event \\\"${ev.key}\\\": target not found`); return; }\\n\\n    const p = ev.params;\\n    switch (ev.action) {\\n      case \\\"change_layer\\\":\\n        node.layer = (p.layer as number) ?? Layers.Enum.DEFAULT;\\n        break;\\n      case \\\"set_active\\\":\\n        node.active = (p.active as boolean) ?? true;\\n        break;\\n      case \\\"set_scale\\\":\\n        node.setScale(\\n          (p.x as number) ?? node.scale.x,\\n          (p.y as number) ?? node.scale.y,\\n          (p.z as number) ?? node.scale.z,\\n        );\\n        break;\\n      case \\\"play_anim\\\": {\\n        const skeleton = node.getComponent(\\\"sp.Skeleton\\\") as any;\\n        if (skeleton) {\\n          skeleton.setAnimation((p.trackIndex as number) ?? 0, p.anim as string, (p.loop as boolean) ?? false);\\n        } else {\\n          const anim = node.getComponent(\\\"cc.Animation\\\") as any;\\n          if (anim) anim.play(p.anim as string);\\n        }\\n        break;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  private resolveEventTarget(ev: EventData): Node | null {\\n    const target = ev.params.target as string | number | undefined;\\n    if (target == null) return null;\\n    // number → targets 陣列 index\\n    if (typeof target === \\\"number\\\") return this.targets[target] ?? log } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport Game_Define, { SymbolInfo } from \\\"./Game_Define\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"./GameView\\\";\\nimport { SingleCell } from \\\"./SingleCell\\\";\\n\\nconst { number) => SpriteFrame = null;\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 獲取符號陣列\\n     * @returns 符號陣列\\n     */\\n    public get Symbols()\\n    {\\n        return this.m_symbols;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *        this.m_name = v;\\n    }\\n\\n    private m_basePos: Vec3 = v3( 0, 0, 0 );\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 將每個column的每個row都設定可能出現的東西(sprite, prefab)\\n     * @param parent 父節點\\n     * @param gameView 遊戲視圖\\n     * @param name 列名\\n     * @param nodeCount 節點數量\\n     * @param getSpriteFrame 獲取SpriteFrame的函數\\n     * @param layer 圖層\\n     */\\n    constructor( \\n        parent: Node, \\n        gameView: GameView, \\n        name: string, \\n        nodeCount?: number,\\n        getSpriteFrame?: (symbolId: number) => SpriteFrame,\\n        layer?: number\\n    )\\n    {\\n        this.m_parentNode = parent;\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n        \\n        this.m_nodeCount = nodeCount;\\n        \\n        this.m_getSpriteFrame = getSpriteFrame || ((symbolId: number) => this.m_gameView.GetSymbolSpriteFrame(symbolId));\\n\\n        for ( let row = 0; row < this.m_nodeCount; ++row )\\n        {\\n            let singleCell = new SingleCell(this.m_parentNode, this.m_gameView, name, row);\\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ] = singleCell;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定要顯示在盤面上的symbol資訊\\n     * @param symbolInfos 要顯示的symbol資訊\\n     * @param isResetPosition 是否重置位置\\n     */\\n    SetSymbolInfos( symbolInfos: SymbolInfo[], isResetPosition: boolean = true )\\n    {\\n        // 更新symbols陣列以保持相容性\\n        this.m_symbols = symbolInfos.map( info => info.Symbol );\\n        \\n        for ( let row = 0; row < this.m_singleCells.length; ++row )\\n        {\\n            // 有些遊戲每個Column的symbol數量不一定\\n            if ( row < symbolInfos.length )\\n            {\\n                this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetSymbolShow( true );\\n                this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetInfo( symbolInfos[ row ] );\\n                if (isResetPosition) {\\n                    this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetPosition( this.CalPosY( row ) );\\n                }\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetSymbolShow( false );\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 置換Symbol\\n     * @param symbol 要置換的Symbol\\n     * @param row 要置換的行\\n     */\\n    ChangeSymbol( symbol: number, row: number )\\n    {\\n        if ( row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n        {\\n            let symbolInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n            symbolInfo.Symbol = symbol;\\n            symbolInfo.Value = 0;\\n            symbolInfo.JpType = 0;\\n            \\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ].ChangeSymbol( symbolInfo );\\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetSymbolShow( true );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 置換Symbol資訊\\n     * @param symbolInfo 要置換的Symbol資訊\\n     * @param row 要置換的行\\n     */\\n    ChangeSymbolInfo( symbolInfo: SymbolInfo, row: number )\\n    {\\n        if ( row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n        {\\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ].ChangeSymbol( symbolInfo );\\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetSymbolShow( true );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定位置\\n     * @param pos 要設定的位置\\n     */\\n    SetPosition( pos: Vec3 )\\n    {\\n        this.m_basePos = pos;\\n        for ( let row = 0; row < this.m_symbols.length; ++row )\\n        {\\n            let pos = this.CalPosY( row );\\n\\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetPosition( pos );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算Y軸座標，要用clone不然會被pos戳到\\n     * @param row 要計算的行\\n     * @returns 計算後的Y軸座標\\n     */\\n    CalPosY( row: number ): Vec3\\n    {\\n        let pos = this.m_basePos.clone();\\n        // 因為上下顛倒，這邊用減的，使用動態的nodeCount\\n        pos.y += ( this.m_nodeCount - 1 - row + 0.5 ) * Game_Define.SymbolHeight;\\n        return pos;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 計算靜止時Y軸座標，多用一個靜止的，省得被其他東西戳到\\n     * @param row 要計算的行\\n     * @returns 計算後的Y軸座標\\n     */\\n    CalStopPosY( row: number ): Vec3\\n    {\\n        let pos = v3( 0, 0, 0 );\\n        // 因為上下顛倒，這邊用減的，使用動態的nodeCount\\n        pos.y += ( this.m_nodeCount - 2.5 - row + 0.5 ) * Game_Define.SymbolHeight;\\n        return pos;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定特定位置的Symbol是否顯示\\n     * @param row 行索引 (0 ~ Game_Define.ROW-1)\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    SetSymbolShow( row: number, isShow: boolean )\\n    {\\n        if ( row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n        {\\n            this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetSymbolShow( isShow );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 顯示此Col\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    SetColumnShow( isShow: boolean )\\n    {\\n        for ( let i = 0; i < this.m_nodeCount; ++i )\\n        {\\n            this.SetSymbolShow( i, isShow );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 壓黑此Col\\n     * @param setToDark 是否壓黑\\n     */\\n    SetSymbolDark( setToDark: boolean )\\n    {\\n        for ( let i = 0; i < this.m_nodeCount; ++i )\\n        {\\n            if ( i < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n            {\\n                this.m_singleCells[ i ].SetSymbolDark( setToDark );\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 動態調整符號數量 - 彈性轉輪系統新增\\n     * @param newCount 新的符號數量\\n     */\\n    ResizeSymbolCount( newCount: number )\\n    {\\n        if ( newCount === this.m_nodeCount )\\n        {\\n            return; // 數量相同，無需調整\\n        }\\n        \\n        if ( newCount > this.m_nodeCount )\\n        {\\n            // 需要增加符號\\n            for ( let row = this.m_nodeCount; row < newCount; ++row )\\n            {\\n                let singleCell = new SingleCell(this.m_parentNode, this.m_gameView, this.m_name, row);\\n                singleCell.SetSymbolShow( false ); // 預設隱藏，等待設定符號時顯示\\n                this.m_singleCells[ row ] = singleCell;\\n            }\\n        }\\n        else\\n        {\\n            // 需要減少符號 - 隱藏多餘的符號\\n            for ( let row = newCount; row < this.m_nodeCount; ++row )\\n            {\\n                if ( row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n                {\\n                    this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetSymbolShow( false );\\n                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n        \\n        this.m_nodeCount = newCount;\\n        \\n        // 重新計算並設定所有符號的位置\\n        this.ResetAllSymbolPositions();\\n    }\\n    \\n    /**@ch 重新計算所有符號位置 */\\n    private ResetAllSymbolPositions()\\n    {\\n        for ( let row = 0; row < this.m_symbols.length && row < this.m_nodeCount; ++row )\\n        {\\n            if ( row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n            {\\n                this.m_singleCells[ row ].SetPosition( this.CalPosY( row ) );\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得特定位置的符號ID\\n     * @param row 要取得的行\\n     * @returns 符號ID\\n     */\\n    GetSymbolAt( row: number ): number\\n    {\\n        if ( row >= 0 && row < this.m_symbols.length )\\n        {\\n            return this.m_symbols[ row ];\\n        }\\n        return -1; // 無效位置\\n    }\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定特定位置的符號ID\\n     * @param row 要設定的行\\n     * @param symbolId 要設定的符號ID\\n     */\\n    SetSymbolAt( row: number, symbolId: number )\\n    {\\n        if ( row >= 0 && row < this.m_symbols.length )\\n        {\\n            this.m_symbols[ row ] = symbolId;\\n            this.ChangeSymbol( symbolId, row );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定特定位置的符號資訊\\n     * @param row 要設定的行\\n     * @param symbolInfo 要設定的符號資訊\\n     */\\n    SetSymbolInfoAt( row: number, symbolInfo: SymbolInfo )\\n    {\\n        if ( row >= 0 && row < this.m_symbols.length )\\n        {\\n            this.m_symbols[ row ] = symbolInfo.Symbol;\\n            this.ChangeSymbolInfo( symbolInfo, row );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得特定位置的Node\\n     * @param row 要取得的行\\n     * @returns Node\\n     */\\n    GetSymbolNodeAt( row: number ): Node\\n    {\\n        if ( row >= 0 && row < this.m_symbols.length && row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n        {\\n            return this.m_singleCells[ row ].ThisNode;\\n        }\\n        return null; // 無效位置\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得特定位置的 SingleCell\\n     * @param row 要取得的行\\n     * @returns SingleCell\\n     */\\n    GetSingleCell( row: number ): SingleCell\\n    {\\n        if ( row >= 0 && row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n        {\\n            return this.m_singleCells[ row ];\\n        }\\n        return null; // 無效位置\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得特定位置的Node\\n     * @param row 要取得的行\\n     * @returns Node\\n     */\\n    GetSymbolSingleCellAt( row: number ): SingleCell\\n    {\\n        if ( row >= 0 && row < this.m_symbols.length && row < this.m_singleCells.length )\\n        {\\n            return this.m_singleCells[ row ];\\n        }\\n        return null; // 無效位置\\n    }\\n\\n    FillSymbol( )\\n    {\\n\\n       \\n\\n        class TempSymbolData\\n        {\\n            public symbolID: number;\\n            public symbolInfo: SymbolInfo;\\n            public pos: Vec3;\\n            public isShow: boolean;\\n\\n        }\\n\\n        let fillSymbols: TempSymbolData[] = [];\\n        let leftSymbols: TempSymbolData[] = [];\\n        for(let i = this.m_singleCells.length-1; i >= 0; i--)\\n        {\\n            if(this.m_singleCells[i].ThisNode.active)\\n            {\\n                let symbolInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n                symbolInfo.Symbol = this.m_symbols[i];\\n                symbolInfo.Value = 0;\\n                symbolInfo.JpType = 0;\\n                \\n                let tempSymbolData = new TempSymbolData();\\n                tempSymbolData.symbolID = this.m_symbols[i];\\n                tempSymbolData.symbolInfo = symbolInfo;\\n                tempSymbolData.pos = this.m_singleCells[i].ThisNode.position;\\n                tempSymbolData.isShow = true;\\n                \\n                leftSymbols.push(tempSymbolData);\\n                \\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                let symbolInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n                symbolInfo.Symbol = this.m_symbols[i];\\n                symbolInfo.Value = 0;\\n                symbolInfo.JpType = 0;\\n                \\n                let tempSymbolData = new TempSymbolData();\\n                tempSymbolData.symbolID = this.m_symbols[i];\\n                tempSymbolData.symbolInfo = symbolInfo;\\n                tempSymbolData.pos = this.m_singleCells[i].ThisNode.position;\\n                tempSymbolData.isShow = false;\\n                fillSymbols.push(tempSymbolData);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        for(let i = this.m_singleCells.length-1; i >= 0; i--)\\n        {\\n            if(leftSymbols.length > 0)\\n            {\\n                let tempSymbolData = leftSymbols.shift();\\n                this.m_singleCells[i].ChangeSymbol( tempSymbolData.symbolInfo );\\n                this.m_singleCells[i].SetSymbolShow( tempSymbolData.isShow );\\n                this.m_singleCells[i].ThisNode.setPosition( tempSymbolData.pos );\\n                this.m_symbols[i] = tempSymbolData.symbolID;\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                let tempSymbolData = fillSymbols.shift();\\n                this.m_singleCells[i].ChangeSymbol( tempSymbolData.symbolInfo );\\n                this.m_singleCells[i].SetSymbolShow( tempSymbolData.isShow );\\n\\n                this.m_symbols[i] = tempSymbolData.symbolID;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        \\n    }\\n\\n    ReFillSymbol( symbol: SingleCell, symbolId: number, id:number )\\n    {\\n\\n        let symbolInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n        symbolInfo.Symbol = symbolId;\\n        symbolInfo.Value = 0;\\n        symbolInfo.JpType = 0;  \\n        symbol.ChangeSymbol( symbolInfo );\\n        symbol.SetSymbolShow( true );\\n        this.m_symbols[id] = symbolId;\\n\\n    }\\n}\",\"numLines\":449,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":449}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\SingleCell.ts\",\"content\":\"import { _decorator, Node, Vec3, v3, Sprite, Layers } from 'cc';\\nimport Game_Define, { SymbolInfo } from \\\"./Game_Define\\\";\\nimport { Define, tools } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\\nimport GameView from './GameView';\\n\\n/**\\n * 安全地使用 tools.strip 方法的輔助函數\\n * @param value 要處理的數值\\n * @param precision 精度（可選）\\n * @returns 處理後的數值\\n */\\nfunction safeStrip(value: number, precision?: number): number {\\n    try {\\n        // 確保 value 是有效的數字\\n        if (typeof value !== 'number' || isNaN(value)) {\\n            console.warn('[safeStrip] 無效的數值:', value);\\n            return 0;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 優先使用 tools.strip 方法\\n        if (tools && typeof tools.strip === 'function') {\\n            const result = tools.strip(value, precision);\\n            // 檢查結果是否有效\\n            if (typeof result === 'number' && !isNaN(result)) {\\n                return result;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 備用方法：使用 parseFloat 和 toPrecision 來處理精度問題\\n        const defaultPrecision = precision !== undefined ? precision : 12;\\n        return parseFloat(value.toPrecision(defaultPrecision));\\n    } catch (error) {\\n        console.error('[safeStrip] 錯誤:', error, '數值:', value);\\n        return value; FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL:\\n                this.OnGetRandomSymbol(args);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL_INFO:\\n                this.OnGetRandomSymbolInfo(args);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_DATA_LENGTH:\\n                this.OnGetDataLength(args);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_REAL_INDEX:\\n                this.OnGetRealIndex(args);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.GET_RANDOM_SEED:\\n                this.OnGetRandomSeed(args);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case FAKE_REEL_MANAGER_EVENT.IS_AVAILABLE:\\n                this.OnIsAvailable(args);\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[FakeReelManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Event Handlers\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 LOAD_FAKE_REEL_DATA 事件\\n     * 載入 MainGame 和 FreeGame 的假轉輪帶資料\\n     */\\n    private OnLoadFakeReelData() {\\n        // 載入 MainGame 資料\\n        this.LoadFakeReelData(FeverGameType.MainGame);\\n\\n        // 載入 FreeGame 資料\\n        this.LoadFakeReelData(FeverGameType.FreeGame);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL 事件\\n     * @param args [gameType, reelIndex, position, callback]\\n     */\\n    private OnGetRandomSymbol(args: any[]) {\\n        const gameType = this.ValidateGameTypeArg(args);\\n        const reelIndex = this.ValidateReelIndexArg(args, 1);\\n        const position = args.length > 2 && typeof args[2] === 'number' ? args[2] : -1;\\n        const callback = args.length > 3 && typeof args[3] === 'function' ? args[3] : null;\\n\\n        // 驗證失敗時執行 callback 並回傳預設值\\n        if (gameType < 0 || reelIndex < 0) {\\n            callback?.(DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.SYMBOL);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const result = this.GetRandomSymbolFromFakeReel(gameType, reelIndex, position);\\n        callback?.(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GET_RANDOM_SYMBOL_INFO 事件\\n     * @param args [gameType, reelIndex, position, callback]\\n     */\\n    private OnGetRandomSymbolInfo(args: any[]) {\\n        const gameType = this.ValidateGameTypeArg(args);\\n        const reelIndex = this.ValidateReelIndexArg(args, 1);\\n        const position = args.length > 2 && typeof args[2] === 'number' ? args[2] : -1;\\n        const callback = args.length > 3 && typeof args[3] === 'function' ? args[3] : null;\\n\\n        // 驗證失敗時執行 callback 並回傳預設 SymbolInfo\\n        if (gameType < 0 || reelIndex < 0) {\\n            const defaultInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n            defaultInfo.Symbol = DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.SYMBOL;\\n            defaultInfo.Value = DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.NUMBER;\\n            defaultInfo.JpType = DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.NUMBER;\\n            callback?.(defaultInfo);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const result = this.GetRandomSymbolFromFakeReelInfo(gameType, reelIndex, position);\\n        callback?.(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GET_DATA_LENGTH 事件\\n     * @param args [gameType, callback]\\n     */\\n    private OnGetDataLength(args: any[]) {\\n        const gameType = this.ValidateGameTypeArg(args);\\n        const callback = args.length > 1 && typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : null;\\n\\n        // 驗證失敗時執行 callback 並回傳預設值\\n        if (gameType < 0) {\\n            callback?.(DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.NUMBER);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const result = this.GetFakeReelDataLength(gameType);\\n        callback?.(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GET_REAL_INDEX 事件\\n     * @param args [gameType, seed, callback]\\n     */\\n    private OnGetRealIndex(args: any[]) {\\n        const gameType = this.ValidateGameTypeArg(args);\\n        const callback = args.length > 2 && typeof args[2] === 'function' ? args[2] : null;\\n\\n        // 驗證 gameType\\n        if (gameType < 0) {\\n            callback?.(DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.NUMBER);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 驗證 seed 參數\\n        if (args.length < 2 || typeof args[1] !== 'number') {\\n            warn('[FakeReelManager] 無效的 seed 參數', args[1]);\\n            callback?.(DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.NUMBER);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const seed = args[1];\\n        const result = this.GetRealFakeReelIndex(gameType, seed);\\n        callback?.(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GET_RANDOM_SEED 事件\\n     * @param args [gameType, callback]\\n     */\\n    private OnGetRandomSeed(args: any[]) {\\n        const gameType = this.ValidateGameTypeArg(args);\\n        const callback = args.length > 1 && typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : null;\\n\\n        // 驗證失敗時執行 callback 並回傳預設值\\n        if (gameType < 0) {\\n            callback?.(DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.NUMBER);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const result = this.GetRandomFakeReelSeed(gameType);\\n        callback?.(result);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 IS_AVAILABLE 事件\\n     * @param args [gameType, callback]\\n     */\\n    private OnIsAvailable(args: any[]) {\\n        const gameType = this.ValidateGameTypeArg(args);\\n        const callback = args.length > 1 && typeof args[1] === 'function' ? args[1] : null;\\n\\n        // 驗證失敗時執行 callback 並回傳預設值\\n        if (gameType < 0) {\\n            callback?.(DEFAULT_ERROR_VALUES.BOOLEAN);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const result = this.IsFakeReelAvailable(gameType);\\n        callback?.(result);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Handlers\\n\\n    //#region Private Methods\\n    /**@ch 根據遊戲類型取得假轉輪帶資料檔案 */\\n    private GetFakeReelAsset(gameType: number): TextAsset\\n    {\\n        if (gameType === FeverGameType.FreeGame) {\\n            return this.m_fakeReelAsset_FreeGame;\\n        }\\n        // MainGame 為預設值\\n        return this.m_fakeReelAsset_MainGame;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 載入並解析假轉輪帶資料 */\\n    private LoadFakeReelData(gameType: number): boolean\\n    {\\n        if (this.m_isFakeReelLoaded[gameType]) {\\n            return true;\\n        }\\n\\n        const asset = this.GetFakeReelAsset(gameType);\\n        if (!asset) {\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n\\n        try {\\n            this.ParseFakeReelData(gameType, asset.text);\\n            this.m_isFakeReelLoaded[gameType] = true;\\n            return true;\\n        } catch (err) {\\n            error(`[FakeReelManager] 解析假轉輪帶檔案失敗 (GameType: ${gameType}): ${err}`);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 解析假轉輪帶檔案內容 */\\n    private ParseFakeReelData(gameType: number, fileContent: string): void\\n    {\\n        const lines = fileContent.split('\\\\n');\\n        this.m_fakeReelData[gameType] = [];\\n\\n        for (let i = FAKE_REEL_DATA_START_LINE; i < lines.length; i++) {\\n            const line = lines[i].trim();\\n            if (line === '') continue;\\n\\n            // 解析每行的格式: \\\"2\\t10\\t5\\t3\\t5\\t4\\t0\\t5\\t12\\t12\\t8\\t8\\t0\\t2\\t7\\\"\\n            // 直接用 \\\\t 分割\\n            const parts = line.split('\\\\t');\\n\\n            const symbolData = parts.map(str => {\\n                const num = parseInt(str.trim());\\n                return isNaN(num) ? 0 : num;\\n            });\\n\\n            // 確保每行都有 FAKE_REEL_COUNT 個轉輪帶資料\\n            // log symbolData for debug\\n            // log(`symbolData: ${symbolData}`);\\n            if (symbolData.length === FAKE_REEL_COUNT) {\\n                this.m_fakeReelData[gameType].push(symbolData);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        if (this.m_fakeReelData[gameType].length === 0) {\\n            error(`解析假轉輪帶檔案失敗 (GameType: ${gameType})：沒有找到有效的資料行`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Private Methods\\n\\n    //#region FakeReel\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 從指定假轉輪帶編號取得隨機符號\\n     * @param gameType 遊戲類型 (MainGame/FreeGame)\\n     * @param reelIndex 轉輪帶編號\\n     * @param position 位置\\n     * @returns 隨機符號\\n     */\\n    private GetRandomSymbolFromFakeReel(gameType: number = FeverGameType.MainGame, reelIndex: number, position: number = -1): number\\n    {\\n        // 確保假轉輪帶資料已載入\\n        if (!this.m_isFakeReelLoaded[gameType]) {\\n            if (!this.LoadFakeReelData(gameType)) {\\n                // 載入失敗，使用預設隨機邏輯\\n                return this.CreateDefaultSymbol();\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 檢查轉輪帶編號有效性\\n        if (reelIndex < 0 || reelIndex >= FAKE_REEL_COUNT) {\\n            return this.CreateDefaultSymbol();\\n        }\\n\\n        // 檢查是否有資料\\n        if (!this.m_fakeReelData[gameType] || this.m_fakeReelData[gameType].length === 0) {\\n            return this.CreateDefaultSymbol();\\n        }\\n\\n        \\n\\n        // 隨機選擇一個位置\\n        const dataLength = this.m_fakeReelData[gameType].length;\\n        const randomRowIndex = position >= 0 && position < dataLength ? position : Math.floor(Math.random() * dataLength);\\n        const selectedSymbol = this.m_fakeReelData[gameType][randomRowIndex][reelIndex];\\n\\n        return selectedSymbol;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 使用假轉輪帶資料產生隨機符號資訊\\n     * @param gameType 遊戲類型 (MainGame/FreeGame)\\n     * @param reelIndex 轉輪帶編號\\n     * @param position 位置\\n     * @returns 隨機符號資訊\\n     */\\n    private GetRandomSymbolFromFakeReelInfo(gameType: number = FeverGameType.MainGame, reelIndex: number, position: number = -1): SymbolInfo\\n    {\\n        const ret = new SymbolInfo();\\n\\n        try {\\n            ret.Symbol = this.GetRandomSymbolFromFakeReel(gameType, reelIndex, position);\\n            ret.Value = 0;\\n            ret.JpType = 0;\\n        } catch (err) {\\n            ret.Symbol = Math.floor(Math.random() * DEFAULT_RANDOM_SYMBOL_MAX);\\n        }\\n\\n        return ret;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得假轉輪帶資料行數\\n     * @param gameType 遊戲類型 (MainGame/FreeGame)\\n     * @returns 假轉輪帶資料行數\\n     */\\n    private GetFakeReelDataLength(gameType: number = FeverGameType.MainGame): number\\n    {\\n        return this.m_fakeReelData[gameType]?.length ?? 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得真實假轉輪帶資料行數，避免超出範圍\\n     * @param gameType 遊戲類型 (MainGame/FreeGame)\\n     * @param seed 隨機行數\\n     * @returns 假轉輪帶資料行數\\n     */\\n    private GetRealFakeReelIndex(gameType: number = FeverGameType.MainGame, seed: number): number\\n    {\\n        const length = this.m_fakeReelData[gameType]?.length ?? 0;\\n        return length > 0 ? seed % length : 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得假轉輪帶資料隨機行數\\n     * @param gameType 遊戲類型 (MainGame/FreeGame)\\n     * @returns 隨機假轉輪帶資料行數\\n     */\\n    private GetRandomFakeReelSeed(gameType: number = FeverGameType.MainGame): number\\n    {\\n        const length = this.m_fakeReelData[gameType]?.length ?? 0;\\n        return length > 0 ? Math.floor(Math.random() * length) : 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 建立預設隨機符號\\n     * @returns 預設隨機符號\\n     */\\n    private CreateDefaultSymbol(): number\\n    {\\n        return Math.floor(Math.random() * DEFAULT_RANDOM_SYMBOL_MAX);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查假轉輪帶是否可用\\n     * @param gameType 遊戲類型 (MainGame/FreeGame)\\n     * @returns 是否可用\\n     */\\n    private IsFakeReelAvailable(gameType: number = FeverGameType.MainGame): boolean\\n    {\\n        const asset = this.GetFakeReelAsset(gameType);\\n        return asset !== null && (this.m_isFakeReelLoaded[gameType] || this.LoadFakeReelData(gameType));\\n    }\\n    //#endregion FakeReel\\n}\\n\\n\",\"numLines\":564,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":564}}"</outcome>

// 可以通過外部設定開啟\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取得單例實例 */\\n    public static GetInstance(): PrefabPoolManager {\\n        if (!PrefabPoolManager.instance) {\\n            PrefabPoolManager.instance = new PrefabPoolManager();\\n        }\\n        return PrefabPoolManager.instance;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch GC 優化：取得快取的 Spine 元件列表（首次查詢後快取）\\n     * @param node 目標節點\\n     * @returns Spine 元件陣列\\n     */\\n    private getCachedSpines(node: Node): sp.Skeleton[] {\\n        let spines = this.m_spineCache.get(node);\\n        if (!spines) {\\n            spines = node.getComponentsInChildren(sp.Skeleton);\\n            this.m_spineCache.set(node, spines);\\n        }\\n        return spines;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊模板（支援 Prefab 或 Node）\\n     * @param key 唯一識別鍵\\n     * @param template Prefab 資源或 Node 實例\\n     * @param preCreateCount 預先建立的節點數量（預設 1）\\n     */\\n    public RegisterTemplate(key: string, template: Prefab | Node, preCreateCount: number = this.DEFAULT_POOL_SIZE): void {\\n        if (!key || !template) {\\n            console.error('PrefabPoolManager: Invalid key or template');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (this.m_templates.has(key)) {\\n            console.warn(`PrefabPoolManager: Key '${key}' already exists, overriding...`);\\n        }\\n\\n        // 儲存模板\\n        this.m_templates.set(key, template);\\n\\n        // 建立新的物件池\\n        const pool = new NodePool();\\n        pool.poolHandlerComp = null;\\n\\n        // 預先建立節點到池中\\n        for (let i = 0; i < preCreateCount; i++) {\\n            const node = this.CreateNodeFromTemplate(template);\\n            if (node) {\\n                node.active = false;\\n                pool.put(node);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_pools.set(key, pool);\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            const templateType = template instanceof Prefab ? Call RegisterTemplate/RegisterPrefab/RegisterNode first.`);\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        let node: Node;\\n        \\n        // 嘗試從池中取得節點\\n        if (pool.size() > 0) {\\n            node = pool.get();\\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Retrieved '${key}' from pool (pool size: ${pool.size()})`);\\n            }\\n        } else {\\n            // 池中沒有節點，建立新的\\n            node = this.CreateNodeFromTemplate(template);\\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Created new '${key}' node     });\\n        }\\n\\n        return node;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 歸還節點到物件池\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @param node 要歸還的節點\\n     */\\n    public ReturnNode(key: string, node:  return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n            console.warn(`PrefabPoolManager: Invalid node for key '${key}'`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 重置節點狀態\\n        node.active = false;\\n\\n        // ⭐ 新增：停用所有 Spine 組件（優化版：混合策略）\\n        // 優先處理根節點的 Spine 組件（大多數情況）\\n        const rootSpine = node.getComponent(sp.Skeleton);\\n        if (rootSpine && rootSpine.enabled) {\\n            rootSpine.clearTracks();       // 清除動畫軌道\\n            rootSpine.setToSetupPose();    // 重置為初始姿勢\\n            rootSpine.enabled = false;     // 停用組件\\n\\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Disabled root Spine component on '${key}'`);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 只在有子節點時才處理子 Spine（使用快取避免遍歷子樹）\\n        if (node.children.length > 0) {\\n            const childSpines = this.getCachedSpines(node);\\n\\n            childSpines.forEach(spine => {\\n                // 跳過已處理的根節點 Spine\\n                if (spine !== rootSpine && spine.enabled) {\\n                    spine.clearTracks();\\n                    spine.setToSetupPose();\\n                    spine.enabled = false;\\n\\n                    if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                        log(`PrefabPoolManager: Disabled child Spine component on '${key}'`);\\n                    }\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        node.removeFromParent();\\n        node.setScale(1, 1, 1);\\n        node.setPosition(0, 0, 0);\\n\\n        // 歸還到池中\\n        pool.put(node);\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Returned '${key}' to pool (pool size: ${pool.size()})`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理特定類型的物件池\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     */\\n    public ClearPool(key: string): void {\\n        const pool = this.m_pools.get(key);\\n        \\n        if (!pool) {\\n            console.error(`PrefabPoolManager: Key '${key}' not found`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const oldSize = pool.size();\\n        pool.clear();\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Cleared pool '${key}' (${oldSize} nodes removed)`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理所有物件池\\n     */\\n    public ClearAllPools(): void {\\n        let totalCleared = 0;\\n        \\n        this.m_pools.forEach((pool, key) => {\\n            const size = pool.size();\\n            pool.clear();\\n            totalCleared += size;\\n            \\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Cleared pool '${key}' (${size} nodes)`);\\n            }\\n        });\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Total ${totalCleared} nodes cleared from all pools`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得物件池大小\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @returns 池中節點數量\\n     */\\n    public GetPoolSize(key: string): number {\\n        const pool = this.m_pools.get(key);\\n        return pool ? pool.size() : 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查模板是否已註冊\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @returns 是否已註冊\\n     */\\n    public IsRegistered(key: string): boolean {\\n        return this.m_templates.has(key);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得所有已註冊的模板鍵值\\n     * @returns 鍵值陣列\\n     */\\n    public GetRegisteredKeys(): string[] {\\n        return Array.from(this.m_templates.keys());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定除錯模式\\n     * @param enabled 是否啟用除錯\\n     */\\n    public i < Game_Define.EFFECT_TYPES; i++)\\n        {\\n            this.m_Prefabs[i] = [];\\n            this.m_PoolMaps[i] = [];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 設定預製體並建立對應的 NodePool */\\n    SetPrefabs(prefabs: Array<Prefab>, primaryType: number)\\n    {\\n        if (primaryType >= Game_Define.EFFECT_TYPES || primaryType < 0)\\n        {\\n            console.error(`Invalid primaryType: ${primaryType}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_Prefabs[primaryType] = prefabs;\\n        this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType] = [];\\n\\n        for (let i = 0; i < prefabs.length; i++)\\n        {\\n            const pool = new NodePool();\\n            pool.poolHandlerComp = null;\\n            \\n            // 預先建立一些節點到池中\\n            for (let j = 0; j < this.m_PoolDefaultSize; j++)\\n            {\\n                const node = instantiate(prefabs[i]);\\n                node.active = false;\\n                pool.put(node);\\n            }\\n            \\n            this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType][i] = pool;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 從物件池取得節點 */\\n    GetNode(primaryType: number, secondaryType: number): Node\\n    {\\n        if (primaryType >= Game_Define.EFFECT_TYPES || primaryType < 0)\\n        {\\n            throw new Error(`Invalid primaryType: ${primaryType}`);\\n        }\\n\\n        if (!this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType] || !this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType][secondaryType])\\n        {\\n            throw new Error(`Pool not found for primaryType: ${primaryType}, secondaryType: ${secondaryType}.   <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Common\\\\PrefabPoolManager.ts\",\"content\":\"import { Node, Prefab, instantiate, NodePool, Vec3, sp, log } from 'cc';\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 通用節點物件池管理器\\n * \\n * 功能特色：\\n * - 基於字符串鍵值的物件池管理\\n * - 支援 Prefab 和 Node 作為模板\\n * - 自動節點生命週期管理\\n * - 提供便捷的節點取得和歸還方法\\n * - 集中的記憶體管理和除錯功能\\n * \\n * 使用場景：\\n * - 炸彈效果系統\\n * - 動態特效管理\\n * - 可重用的 UI 元件\\n * - 任何需要頻繁創建/銷毀節點的場景\\n */\\nexport class PrefabPoolManager {\\n    private static instance: PrefabPoolManager = null;\\n    \\n    /**@ch 物件池映射表 */\\n    private m_pools: Map<string, NodePool> = new Map();\\n    \\n    /**@ch 模板映射表（可以是 Prefab 或 Node） */\\n    private m_templates: Map<string, Prefab | Node> = new Map();\\n    \\n    /**@ch 預設池大小 */\\n    private readonly DEFAULT_POOL_SIZE: number = 1;\\n    \\n    /**@ch 是否啟用除錯日誌 */\\n    private m_debugMode: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /** @ch GC 優化：快取節點的 Spine 元件列表，避免每次 get/return 遍歷子樹 */\\n    private m_spineCache: WeakMap<Node, sp.Skeleton[]> = new WeakMap();\\n\\n    private constructor() {\\n        this.m_debugMode = false; // 可以通過外部設定開啟\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取得單例實例 */\\n    public static GetInstance(): PrefabPoolManager {\\n        if (!PrefabPoolManager.instance) {\\n            PrefabPoolManager.instance = new PrefabPoolManager();\\n        }\\n        return PrefabPoolManager.instance;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch GC 優化：取得快取的 Spine 元件列表（首次查詢後快取）\\n     * @param node 目標節點\\n     * @returns Spine 元件陣列\\n     */\\n    private getCachedSpines(node: Node): sp.Skeleton[] {\\n        let spines = this.m_spineCache.get(node);\\n        if (!spines) {\\n            spines = node.getComponentsInChildren(sp.Skeleton);\\n            this.m_spineCache.set(node, spines);\\n        }\\n        return spines;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊模板（支援 Prefab 或 Node）\\n     * @param key 唯一識別鍵\\n     * @param template Prefab 資源或 Node 實例\\n     * @param preCreateCount 預先建立的節點數量（預設 1）\\n     */\\n    public RegisterTemplate(key: string, template: Prefab | Node, preCreateCount: number = this.DEFAULT_POOL_SIZE): void {\\n        if (!key || !template) {\\n            console.error('PrefabPoolManager: Invalid key or template');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (this.m_templates.has(key)) {\\n            console.warn(`PrefabPoolManager: Key '${key}' already exists, overriding...`);\\n        }\\n\\n        // 儲存模板\\n        this.m_templates.set(key, template);\\n\\n        // 建立新的物件池\\n        const pool = new NodePool();\\n        pool.poolHandlerComp = null;\\n\\n        // 預先建立節點到池中\\n        for (let i = 0; i < preCreateCount; i++) {\\n            const node = this.CreateNodeFromTemplate(template);\\n            if (node) {\\n                node.active = false;\\n                pool.put(node);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_pools.set(key, pool);\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            const templateType = template instanceof Prefab ? 'Prefab' : 'Node';\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Registered '${key}' (${templateType}) with ${preCreateCount} pre-created nodes`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊 Prefab 類型（向後兼容）\\n     * @param key 唯一識別鍵\\n     * @param prefab Prefab 資源\\n     * @param preCreateCount 預先建立的節點數量（預設 1）\\n     */\\n    public RegisterPrefab(key: string, prefab: Prefab, preCreateCount: number = this.DEFAULT_POOL_SIZE): void {\\n        this.RegisterTemplate(key, prefab, preCreateCount);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 註冊 Node 類型\\n     * @param key 唯一識別鍵\\n     * @param node Node 實例（將作為模板使用）\\n     * @param preCreateCount 預先建立的節點數量（預設 1）\\n     */\\n    public RegisterNode(key: string, node: Node, preCreateCount: number = this.DEFAULT_POOL_SIZE): void {\\n        this.RegisterTemplate(key, node, preCreateCount);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 從模板創建節點\\n     * @param template Prefab 或 Node 模板\\n     * @returns 新的節點實例\\n     */\\n    private CreateNodeFromTemplate(template: Prefab | Node): Node {\\n        if (template instanceof Prefab) {\\n            return instantiate(template);\\n        } else {\\n            // 如果是 Node，創建一個副本\\n            const clonedNode = instantiate(template);\\n            return clonedNode;\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得節點\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @param parent 父節點（可選）\\n     * @param position 位置（可選）\\n     * @param scale 縮放（可選）\\n     * @returns 節點實例\\n     */\\n    public GetNode(key: string, parent?: Node, position: Vec3 = Vec3.ZERO, scale: Vec3 = Vec3.ONE): Node {\\n        const pool = this.m_pools.get(key);\\n        const template = this.m_templates.get(key);\\n\\n        if (!pool || !template) {\\n            console.error(`PrefabPoolManager: Key '${key}' not registered. Call RegisterTemplate/RegisterPrefab/RegisterNode first.`);\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        let node: Node;\\n        \\n        // 嘗試從池中取得節點\\n        if (pool.size() > 0) {\\n            node = pool.get();\\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Retrieved '${key}' from pool (pool size: ${pool.size()})`);\\n            }\\n        } else {\\n            // 池中沒有節點，建立新的\\n            node = this.CreateNodeFromTemplate(template);\\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Created new '${key}' node (pool empty)`);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 設定節點屬性\\n        node.active = true;\\n\\n        if (parent) {\\n            node.setParent(parent);\\n        }\\n\\n        if (position) {\\n            node.setPosition(position);\\n        }\\n\\n        if (scale) {\\n            node.setScale(scale);\\n        }\\n\\n        // ⭐ 重新啟用所有 Spine 組件（使用快取避免遍歷子樹）\\n        const spines = this.getCachedSpines(node);\\n        if (spines && spines.length > 0) {\\n            spines.forEach(spine => {\\n                if (spine && !spine.enabled) {\\n                    spine.enabled = true;\\n\\n                    if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                        log(`PrefabPoolManager: Re-enabled Spine component on '${key}'`);\\n                    }\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        return node;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 歸還節點到物件池\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @param node 要歸還的節點\\n     */\\n    public ReturnNode(key: string, node: Node): void {\\n        const pool = this.m_pools.get(key);\\n        \\n        if (!pool) {\\n            console.error(`PrefabPoolManager: Key '${key}' not found, cannot return node`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (!node || !node.isValid) {\\n            console.warn(`PrefabPoolManager: Invalid node for key '${key}'`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 重置節點狀態\\n        node.active = false;\\n\\n        // ⭐ 新增：停用所有 Spine 組件（優化版：混合策略）\\n        // 優先處理根節點的 Spine 組件（大多數情況）\\n        const rootSpine = node.getComponent(sp.Skeleton);\\n        if (rootSpine && rootSpine.enabled) {\\n            rootSpine.clearTracks();       // 清除動畫軌道\\n            rootSpine.setToSetupPose();    // 重置為初始姿勢\\n            rootSpine.enabled = false;     // 停用組件\\n\\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Disabled root Spine component on '${key}'`);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 只在有子節點時才處理子 Spine（使用快取避免遍歷子樹）\\n        if (node.children.length > 0) {\\n            const childSpines = this.getCachedSpines(node);\\n\\n            childSpines.forEach(spine => {\\n                // 跳過已處理的根節點 Spine\\n                if (spine !== rootSpine && spine.enabled) {\\n                    spine.clearTracks();\\n                    spine.setToSetupPose();\\n                    spine.enabled = false;\\n\\n                    if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                        log(`PrefabPoolManager: Disabled child Spine component on '${key}'`);\\n                    }\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n\\n        node.removeFromParent();\\n        node.setScale(1, 1, 1);\\n        node.setPosition(0, 0, 0);\\n\\n        // 歸還到池中\\n        pool.put(node);\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Returned '${key}' to pool (pool size: ${pool.size()})`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理特定類型的物件池\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     */\\n    public ClearPool(key: string): void {\\n        const pool = this.m_pools.get(key);\\n        \\n        if (!pool) {\\n            console.error(`PrefabPoolManager: Key '${key}' not found`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const oldSize = pool.size();\\n        pool.clear();\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Cleared pool '${key}' (${oldSize} nodes removed)`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 清理所有物件池\\n     */\\n    public ClearAllPools(): void {\\n        let totalCleared = 0;\\n        \\n        this.m_pools.forEach((pool, key) => {\\n            const size = pool.size();\\n            pool.clear();\\n            totalCleared += size;\\n            \\n            if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n                log(`PrefabPoolManager: Cleared pool '${key}' (${size} nodes)`);\\n            }\\n        });\\n\\n        if (this.m_debugMode) {\\n            log(`PrefabPoolManager: Total ${totalCleared} nodes cleared from all pools`);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得物件池大小\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @returns 池中節點數量\\n     */\\n    public GetPoolSize(key: string): number {\\n        const pool = this.m_pools.get(key);\\n        return pool ? pool.size() : 0;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 檢查模板是否已註冊\\n     * @param key 模板識別鍵\\n     * @returns 是否已註冊\\n     */\\n    public IsRegistered(key: string): boolean {\\n        return this.m_templates.has(key);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 取得所有已註冊的模板鍵值\\n     * @returns 鍵值陣列\\n     */\\n    public GetRegisteredKeys(): string[] {\\n        return Array.from(this.m_templates.keys());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定除錯模式\\n     * @param enabled 是否啟用除錯\\n     */\\n    public SetDebugMode(enabled: boolean): void {\\n        this.m_debugMode = enabled;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 印出所有物件池的狀態資訊\\n     */\\n    public LogPoolStatus(): void {\\n        console.log(\\\"=== i < Game_Define.EFFECT_TYPES; i++)\\n        {\\n            this.m_Prefabs[i] = [];\\n            this.m_PoolMaps[i] = [];\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 設定預製體並建立對應的 NodePool */\\n    SetPrefabs(prefabs: Array<Prefab>, primaryType: number)\\n    {\\n        if (primaryType >= Game_Define.EFFECT_TYPES || primaryType < 0)\\n        {\\n            console.error(`Invalid primaryType: ${primaryType}`);\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        this.m_Prefabs[primaryType] = prefabs;\\n        this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType] = [];\\n\\n        for (let i = 0; Make sure to call SetPrefabs first.`);\\n        }\\n\\n        const pool = this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType][secondaryType];\\n        let node = pool.get();\\n        \\n        // 如果池中沒有節點，建立新的\\n        if (!node)\\n        {\\n            if (!this.m_Prefabs[primaryType] || !this.m_Prefabs[primaryType][secondaryType])\\n            {\\n                throw new Error(`Prefab not found for   node.active = true;\\n        return node;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 歸還節點到物件池 */\\n    ReturnNode(primaryType: number, secondaryType: number, node: Node)\\n    {\\n        if (primaryType >= (!this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType] || !this.m_PoolMaps[primaryType][secondaryType])\\n        {\\n            console.error(`Pool not found for primaryType: ${primaryType}, secondaryType: if (pool)\\n                {\\n                    const size = pool.size();\\n                    log(`  SecondaryType[${secondaryType}]: ${size} nodes`);\\n                }\\n t;\\n            return v3(\\n                r * this.pts[ 0 ].x + t * this.pts[ 1 ].x,\\n                r * this.pts[ 0 ].y + t * this.pts[ 1 ].y\\n            );\\n        }\\n\\n        /** 3 階貝茲曲線 */\\n        private Bezier3( t: number ): Vec3\\n        {\\n            let r = 1 - t;\\n            let f = [ r * r, 2 * r * t, t * t ];\\n            return v3(\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].x + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].x + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].x,\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].y + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].y + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].y\\n            );\\n        }\\n\\n        /** 4 階貝茲曲線 */\\n        private Bezier4( t: number ): Vec3\\n        {\\n            let r = 1 - t;\\n            let f = [ r * r * r, 3 * r * r * t, 3 * r * t * t, t * t * t ];\\n            return v3(\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].x + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].x + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].x + f[ 3 ] * this.pts[ 3 ].x,\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].y + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].y + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].y + f[ 3 ] * this.pts[ 3 ].y\\n            );\\n        }\\n\\n        /** 5 階貝茲曲線 */\\n        private Bezier5( t: number ): Vec3\\n        {\\n            let r = 1 - t;\\n            let f = [ r * r * r * r, 4 * r * r * r * t, 6 * r * r * t * t, 4 * r * t * t * t, t * t * t * t ];\\n            return v3(\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].x + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].x + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].x + f[ 3 ] * this.pts[ 3 ].x + f[ 4 ] * this.pts[ 4 ].x,\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].y + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].y + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].y + f[ 3 ] * this.pts[ 3 ].y + f[ 4 ] * this.pts[ 4 ].y\\n            );\\n        }\\n\\n        /** 6 階貝茲曲線 */\\n        private Bezier6( t: number ): Vec3\\n        {\\n            let r = 1 - t;\\n            let f = [ r * r * r * r * r, 5 * r * r * r * r * t, 10 * r * r * r * t * t, 10 * r * r * t * t * t, 5 * r * t * t * t * t, t * t * t * t * t ];\\n            return v3(\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].x + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].x + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].x + f[ 3 ] * this.pts[ 3 ].x + f[ 4 ] * this.pts[ 4 ].x + f[ 5 ] * this.pts[ 5 ].x,\\n                f[ 0 ] * this.pts[ 0 ].y + f[ 1 ] * this.pts[ 1 ].y + f[ 2 ] * this.pts[ 2 ].y + f[ 3 ] * this.pts[ 3 ].y + f[ 4 ] * this.pts[ 4 ].y + f[ 5 ] * this.pts[ 5 ].y\\n            );\\n        }\\n\\n        /** N 階貝茲曲線 */\\n        private BezierN( t: number ): Vec3\\n        {\\n            let r = 1 - t;\\n            let v = v3( 0, 0 );\\n            for ( let i = 0; i < this.len; i++ )\\n            {\\n                let f = 1;\\n                for ( let j = 0; j < this.len - i - 1; j++ )\\n                {\\n                    f *= r;\\n                }\\n                for ( let k = 0; k < i; k++ )\\n                {\\n                    f *= t;\\n                }\\n                v.x += f * this.ptl[ i ] * this.pts[ i ].x;\\n                v.y += f * this.ptl[ i ] * this.pts[ i ].y;\\n            }\\n            return v;\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\",\"numLines\":209,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":209}}"</outcome>

}\\n  get currentTime(): number { return this.elapsed; }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有正在等待 signal 的軌道資訊 */\\n  get waitingTracks(): Array<{ trackId: string; waitingSignal: string }> {\\n    return this.trackStates\\n      .filter((ts) => ts.waitingSignal)\\n      .map((ts) => ({ trackId: ts.trackId, waitingSignal: ts.waitingSignal! }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有已定義的 signal（含是否已觸發） */\\n  get signalStatus(): Array<{ id: string; fired: boolean; at?: number }> {\\n    if (!this.asset) return [];\\n    return this.asset.signals.map((s) => ({ id: s.id, fired: this.firedSignals.has(s.id), at: s.at }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 載入 timeline 資料 */\\n  load(asset: TimelineAsset, callbacks?: PlayerCallbacks): void {\\n    this.asset = asset;\\n    this.callbacks = callbacks ?? {};\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 開始播放 */\\n  play(): void {\\n    if (!this.asset || this._state === PlayState.Playing) return;\\n    this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n    // 觸發所有軌道的第一個 clip\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      this.startClip(ts);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 暫停 */\\n  pause(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Playing) this._state = PlayState.Paused;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 恢復 */\\n  resume(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Paused) this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 停止並重置 */\\n  stop(): void {\\n    this._state = PlayState.Idle;\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 外部發送 signal（解除等待中的軌道） */\\n  emitSignal(signalId: string): void {\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.waitingSignal === signalId) {\\n        ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n        ts.paused = false;\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 每幀呼叫（dt 秒） */\\n  tick(dt: number): void {\\n    if (this._state !== PlayState.Playing || !this.asset) return;\\n\\n    this.elapsed += dt;\\n\\n    // 檢查 time-based signals（防重複）\\n    for (const sig of this.asset.signals) {\\n      if (sig.at != null && this.elapsed >= sig.at && !this.firedSignals.has(sig.id)) {\\n        this.firedSignals.add(sig.id);\\n        this.emitSignal(sig.id);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 檢查事件觸發\\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.asset.events.length; i++) {\\n      const ev = this.asset.events[i];\\n      if (this.elapsed >= ev.time) {\\n        this.eventBus.emit(ev, i);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 推進各軌道\\n    let allFinished = true;\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.paused) { allFinished = false; continue; }\\n      const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n      if (!track) continue;\\n      const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n      if (!clip) continue; // 軌道已結束\\n\\n      ts.clipElapsed += dt;\\n\\n      if (clip.duration > 0 && ts.clipElapsed >= clip.duration) {\\n        // clip 結束\\n        this.callbacks.onClipEnd?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n\\n      if (ts.currentClipIndex < track.clips.length) allFinished = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (allFinished) {\\n      this._state = PlayState.Finished;\\n      this.callbacks.onFinished?.();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Private ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private reset(): void {\\n    this.elapsed = 0;\\n    this.eventBus.reset();\\n    this.firedSignals.clear();\\n    if (!this.asset) { this.trackStates = []; return; }\\n    this.trackStates = this.asset.tracks.map((t) => ({\\n      trackId: t.id,\\n      currentClipIndex: 0,\\n      clipElapsed: 0,\\n      paused: false,\\n    }));\\n  }\\n\\n  private getTrack(id: string): TrackData | undefined {\\n    return this.asset?.tracks.find((t) => t.id === id);\\n  }\\n\\n  private startClip(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n    if (!track) return;\\n    const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n    if (!clip) return;\\n\\n    // duration=-1 表示等待 signal\\n    if (clip.duration < 0) {\\n      ts.paused = true;\\n      ts.waitingSignal = clip.name; // 預設用 clip name 作為 signal ID\\n    }\\n\\n    this.callbacks.onClipStart?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n  }\\n\\n  private advanceTrack(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    ts.currentClipIndex++;\\n    ts.clipElapsed = 0;\\n    ts.paused = false;\\n    ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n    this.startClip(ts);\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":184,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":184}}"</outcome>
