  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_pirates_queen\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Timeline\\\\TimelinePlayer.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * Timeline Player — 播放器核心\\n * 管理時間推進、軌道狀態、clip 切換、signal 等待/恢復。\\n * 不直接操作 Cocos 節點，透過 callback 通知外部 Executor。\\n */\\nimport type { TimelineAsset, TrackData, TrackState, ClipData, SignalData } from \\\"./TimelineData\\\";\\nimport { PlayState } from \\\"./TimelineData\\\";\\nimport { TimelineEventBus } from \\\"./TimelineEvent\\\";\\n\\nexport interface ClipChangeInfo {\\n  track: TrackData;\\n  clip: ClipData;\\n  clipIndex: number;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface PlayerCallbacks {\\n  /** clip 開始播放 */\\n  onClipStart?: (info: ClipChangeInfo) => void;\\n  /** clip 結束 */\\n  onClipEnd?: (info: ClipChangeInfo) => void;\\n  /** timeline 播放完畢 */\\n  onFinished?: () => void;\\n}\\n\\nexport class TimelinePlayer {\\n  private asset: TimelineAsset | null = null;\\n  private trackStates: TrackState[] = [];\\n  private elapsed = 0;\\n  private _state = PlayState.Idle;\\n  private callbacks: PlayerCallbacks = {};\\n  private firedSignals = new Set<string>();\\n  readonly eventBus = new TimelineEventBus();\\n\\n  get state(): PlayState { return this._state; }\\n  get currentTime(): number { return this.elapsed; }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有正在等待 signal 的軌道資訊 */\\n  get waitingTracks(): Array<{ trackId: string; waitingSignal: string }> {\\n    return this.trackStates\\n      .filter((ts) => ts.waitingSignal)\\n      .map((ts) => ({ trackId: ts.trackId, waitingSignal: ts.waitingSignal! }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 取得所有已定義的 signal（含是否已觸發） */\\n  get signalStatus(): Array<{ id: string; fired: boolean; at?: number }> {\\n    if (!this.asset) return [];\\n    return this.asset.signals.map((s) => ({ id: s.id, fired: this.firedSignals.has(s.id), at: s.at }));\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 載入 timeline 資料 */\\n  load(asset: TimelineAsset, callbacks?: PlayerCallbacks): void {\\n    this.asset = asset;\\n    this.callbacks = callbacks ?? {};\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 開始播放 */\\n  play(): void {\\n    if (!this.asset || this._state === PlayState.Playing) return;\\n    this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n    // 觸發所有軌道的第一個 clip\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      this.startClip(ts);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 暫停 */\\n  pause(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Playing) this._state = PlayState.Paused;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 恢復 */\\n  resume(): void {\\n    if (this._state === PlayState.Paused) this._state = PlayState.Playing;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 停止並重置 */\\n  stop(): void {\\n    this._state = PlayState.Idle;\\n    this.reset();\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 外部發送 signal（解除等待中的軌道） */\\n  emitSignal(signalId: string): void {\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.waitingSignal === signalId) {\\n        ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n        ts.paused = false;\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** 每幀呼叫（dt 秒） */\\n  tick(dt: number): void {\\n    if (this._state !== PlayState.Playing || !this.asset) return;\\n\\n    this.elapsed += dt;\\n\\n    // 檢查 time-based signals（防重複）\\n    for (const sig of this.asset.signals) {\\n      if (sig.at != null && this.elapsed >= sig.at && !this.firedSignals.has(sig.id)) {\\n        this.firedSignals.add(sig.id);\\n        this.emitSignal(sig.id);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 檢查事件觸發\\n    for (let i = 0; i < this.asset.events.length; i++) {\\n      const ev = this.asset.events[i];\\n      if (this.elapsed >= ev.time) {\\n        this.eventBus.emit(ev, i);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    // 推進各軌道\\n    let allFinished = true;\\n    for (const ts of this.trackStates) {\\n      if (ts.paused) { allFinished = false; continue; }\\n      const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n      if (!track) continue;\\n      const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n      if (!clip) continue; // 軌道已結束\\n\\n      ts.clipElapsed += dt;\\n\\n      if (clip.duration > 0 && ts.clipElapsed >= clip.duration) {\\n        // clip 結束\\n        this.callbacks.onClipEnd?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n        this.advanceTrack(ts);\\n      }\\n\\n      if (ts.currentClipIndex < track.clips.length) allFinished = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (allFinished) {\\n      this._state = PlayState.Finished;\\n      this.callbacks.onFinished?.();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // ─── Private ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n  private reset(): void {\\n    this.elapsed = 0;\\n    this.eventBus.reset();\\n    this.firedSignals.clear();\\n    if (!this.asset) { this.trackStates = []; return; }\\n    this.trackStates = this.asset.tracks.map((t) => ({\\n      trackId: t.id,\\n      currentClipIndex: 0,\\n      clipElapsed: 0,\\n      paused: false,\\n    }));\\n  }\\n\\n  private getTrack(id: string): TrackData | undefined {\\n    return this.asset?.tracks.find((t) => t.id === id);\\n  }\\n\\n  private startClip(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    const track = this.getTrack(ts.trackId);\\n    if (!track) return;\\n    const clip = track.clips[ts.currentClipIndex];\\n    if (!clip) return;\\n\\n    // duration=-1 表示等待 signal\\n    if (clip.duration < 0) {\\n      ts.paused = true;\\n      ts.waitingSignal = clip.name; // 預設用 clip name 作為 signal ID\\n    }\\n\\n    this.callbacks.onClipStart?.({ track, clip, clipIndex: ts.currentClipIndex });\\n  }\\n\\n  private advanceTrack(ts: TrackState): void {\\n    ts.currentClipIndex++;\\n    ts.clipElapsed = 0;\\n    ts.paused = false;\\n    ts.waitingSignal = undefined;\\n    this.startClip(ts);\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":184,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":184}}"</outcome>

this.m_middleSymbolEmptyNodes.push(middleSymbolEmptyNode);\\n                }\\n            }\\n            this.m_allColumns[ plate ].push( columnSymbol );\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * }\\n\\n    /**@ch 開始Spin，處理相關設置 */\\n    StartSpin()\\n    {\\n        // 關鍵：每次 Spin 都必須重置時間相關狀態，否則第二次會沿用上一局 StopTime/m_time 導致直接停輪\\n        this.m_time = 0;\\n        this.StopTime = 0;\\n        this.m_isStop = false;\\n        // 修 R-1：StartSpin 即凍結轉輪（恢復舊版首幀凍結），凍結貫穿整個掉落序列，\\n        // 預告期間空盤面（舊盤已掉出）保持靜止；drop-in 原子解除才設回 false。\\n        this.m_isInDropMode = true;\\n        // 清掉上一局可能殘留的動畫    this.m_isHasScatterNearWin = false;\\n        this.m_scatterNearWinReachedMax = false;\\n\\n        // 強制關閉上一局殘留的 NearWin 特效\\n        if (this.m_scatterNearWinColumn > -1) {\\n            this.m_scatterNearWinColumn = -1;\\n            this.StopNearWinSound();\\n            this.SetSymbolDark(false, -1);\\n        }\\n        this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.StopNearWin();\\n\\n        // [];\\n        this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.ReturnAllScatterEnterAnimationNodes();\\n\\n        // 防禦性清除：確保所有 symbol 的 sprite 子節點是 active 的 + 移除殘留 reparented 節點\\n        for (let col = 0; col < {\\n                this.m_isChangeToFinalSymbol[ col ] = false;\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 清空並重新初始化有效的列索引（只對中輪帶）\\n        this.m_isNotChangeSymbolThisRound = {};\\n        for ( let this.m_upDownReelChangeState[ nodeName ] = true;\\n                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 設定假轉輪帶隨機行數位置\\n\\n        // 掉落模式：「按 Spin（spin 開始）即觸發舊盤面掉出」——在此 StartSpin 末端觸發，\\n }\\n\\n    static GetGameView(): GameView | null {\\n        return this.m_gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 檢查指定位置是否有效\\n     * @param col 列\\n     * @param row 行\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    static IsValidPosition(col: number, row: number): boolean {\\n        return col >= 0 && col < Game_Define.COL && row >= 0 && row < Game_Define.ROW;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 將節點推入堆疊\\n static PopNode(popupNodeData: PopupNodeData): Node {\\n        if (popupNodeData === null) {\\n            console.error(\\\"PopNode: popupNodeData is null\\\");\\n            return null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const node = popupNodeData.MyNode;\\n        node.setParent(popupNodeData.OriginParent,popupNodeData.IsKeepWorldPosition);\\n        //popupNodeData.OriginParent.addChild(node);\\n node.setPosition(popupNodeData.LocalPosition);\\n        } else {\\n            node.setWorldPosition(popupNodeData.WorldPosition);\\n        }*/\\n        return node;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     *   \\n                try {\\n                    const data = jsonAsset.json || jsonAsset;\\n                    resolve(data);\\n                } catch (parseError) {\\n                    reject(parseError);\\n                }\\n            });\\n        });\\n    };\\n\\n    /**\\n     * 格式化數字為帶有 M/K 後綴的顯示格式\\n     * @param value 要格式化的數值\\n     * @param millionThreshold 百萬閾值，預設為 // 處理百萬級別\\n            let tempString = tools.divide(value, million).toString();\\n            let pos = tempString.indexOf(\\\".\\\");\\n            \\n            if (pos === -1) {\\n                pos = tempString.length;\\n            } else {\\n                // 根據自定義的小數位數計算位置\\n                pos = pos + decimalPlaces + 1 > tempString.length ? tempString.length : pos + decimalPlaces + 1;\\n            }\\n            \\n            showString = tempString.substring(0, pos) + \\\"M\\\";\\n        } else if (value >= thousand) {\\n            // 處理千級別\\n            let tempString = } else {\\n                // 根據自定義的小數位數計算位置\\n                pos = pos + decimalPlaces + 1 > tempString.length ? tempString.length : pos + decimalPlaces + 1;\\n            }\\n            \\n            showString = tempString.substring(0, pos) + \\\"K\\\";\\n        } else {\\n            // 小於千的數值直接顯示\\n            showString = value.toString();\\n        }\\n        \\n        return if (condition()) {\\n                resolve();\\n            } else {\\n                director.once(Director.EVENT_AFTER_UPDATE, check);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        check();\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 每 frame 檢查條件直到為 false 為止\\n */\\nexport function WaitWhile(condition: () => boolean, cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return WaitUntil(() => !condition(), (cancelToken?.isCancelled) { resolve(); return; }\\n        director.once(Director.EVENT_AFTER_UPDATE, () => {\\n            if (cancelToken?.isCancelled) { resolve(); return; }\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 等待指定 frame 數\\n */\\nexport function WaitFrames(frameCount: number, cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return new Promise(resolve => */\\nexport function CreateCancelToken(): CancelToken {\\n    return { isCancelled: false };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":245,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":245}}"</outcome>

i < 5; i++) {\\n *             this.stopReel(i);\\n *             await WaitForSeconds(0.2, cancelToken);  // 每個轉輪間隔 0.2 秒停止\\n *         }\\n *     }\\n * }\\n * \\n * ===== 注意事項 =====\\n * \\n * 1. 所有函式都使用 Cocos Creator 的調度器系統，與引擎生命週期同步\\n * 2. isCancelled: boolean };\\n\\n/**\\n * 內部調度器管理器\\n * 用於管理 Cocos 調度器的實例\\n */\\nclass SchedulerManager {\\n    private static m_instance: SchedulerManager;\\n    private m_dummyComponent: unschedule(callback: () => void): void {\\n        this.m_dummyComponent.unschedule(callback);\\n    }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 等待指定秒數（非阻塞）\\n * 使用 Cocos Creator 的調度器系統，與引擎生命週期同步\\n * @param seconds 秒數（例如 1.5）\\n * @param cancelToken 可選的取消控制\\n */\\nexport function WaitForSeconds(seconds: number, cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\\n        let isResolved = false;\\n        const scheduler = SchedulerManager.getInstance();\\n        \\n        // 創建延遲回調函數\\n        const delayCallback = () => {\\n            if (!cancelToken?.isCancelled && seconds);\\n        \\n        // 如果有取消控制，使用 frame 檢查\\n        if (cancelToken) {\\n            const cancelCheck = () => {\\n                if (cancelToken.isCancelled) {\\n                    if (!isResolved) {\\n                        scheduler.unschedule(delayCallback);\\n                        isResolved = true;\\n                        resolve();\\n                    }\\n      cancelCheck();\\n        }\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 每 frame 檢查條件直到為 true 為止\\n * @param condition 條件函式\\n * @param cancelToken 可選的取消控制\\n */\\nexport function WaitUntil(condition: () => if (condition()) {\\n                resolve();\\n            } else {\\n                director.once(Director.EVENT_AFTER_UPDATE, check);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        check();\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 每 frame 檢查條件直到為 false 為止\\n */\\nexport function WaitWhile(condition: () => boolean, cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return WaitUntil(() => !condition(), cancelToken);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 等待下一個 frame\\n */\\nexport function WaitNextFrame(cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\\n        if (cancelToken?.isCancelled) { resolve(); return; }\\n        director.once(Director.EVENT_AFTER_UPDATE, () => {\\n            if (cancelToken?.isCancelled) { resolve(); return; }\\n            resolve();\\n        });\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 等待指定 frame 數\\n */\\nexport function WaitFrames(frameCount: number, cancelToken?: CancelToken): Promise<void> {\\n    return new Promise(resolve => {\\n        let count = 0;\\n        function next() {\\n            if (cancelToken?.isCancelled) { resolve(); return; }\\n            count++;\\n            if (count >= frameCount) {\\n                resolve();\\n            } else {\\n                director.once(Director.EVENT_AFTER_UPDATE, next);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        next();\\n    });\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 建立取消控制器\\n */\\nexport function CreateCancelToken(): CancelToken {\\n    return { isCancelled: false };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":245,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":245}}"</outcome>

\\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\\nimport { RT_EVENT } from \\\"../RTCtrl\\\";\\n\\nexport class AwardState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n    private m_processTick: number = 0;\\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 現在盤面資訊\\n     */\\n    private m_currentPlateInfo: protocol.ar2pq9Proto.IPlateInfo = null;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnEnter()\\n    {\\n\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : AWARD\\\" );\\n        this.m_processTick = 0;\\n        \\n\\n        const spinAck = this.m_gameView.SpinAck;\\n        const winValue = spinAck.RoundQueue[ this.m_gameView.CurRoundIndex ].RoundWin;\\n        const totalWin = spinAck.TotalWin;\\n\\n        /**@ch 設定盤面符號不暗 */\\n        this.m_gameView.SlotReels.SetSymbolDark( false, -1 );\\n\\n        if ( winValue > 0 && !this.m_gameView.IsGoingToFree )\\n        {\\n            this.ProcessFinalAward(  if ( this.m_processTick > 0 ) return;\\n        }\\n        if ( this.m_gameView.BigWin.IsEnd )\\n        {\\n            this.m_gameView.BigWin.node.active = false;\\n            this.m_gameView.FadeBgmIn();\\n            // RT 解鎖：BigWin 演出結束\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(RT_EVENT.AWARD_OUT_RT);\\n            this.m_gameView.AfterShowWin();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n        this.m_currentPlateInfo = null;\\n        this.m_gameView.CanStopBigWin = false;\\n    }\\n\\n    \\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理最後報獎\\n     * @param totalWin 總贏分\\n     * @param isNotShowNormalWin 是否不顯示NormalWin\\n     */\\n    private ProcessFinalAward(winValue: number, totalWin: number, isNotShowNormalWin: boolean) : void {\\n\\n        const bet: number = Game_Define.BigWinWinRule.BIG_WIN_MIN )\\n        {\\n            if ( isNotShowNormalWin ) return;\\n\\n            // 小獎音效\\n            if (rate < 3) {\\n                AudioManager.Play(AudioManager.AudioClips.Small_Win01);\\n            } else if (rate < 5) {\\n                AudioManager.Play(AudioManager.AudioClips.Small_Win02);\\n            } else {\\n                AudioManager.Play(AudioManager.AudioClips.Small_Win03);\\n            }\\n            this.m_gameView.ShowSmallWinLabel( winValue, Game_Define.SMALLWIN_TIME );\\n            this.m_processTick = Game_Define.SMALLWIN_TIME;\\n            \\n        }\\n        // 大獎\\n        else\\n        {\\n            // RT 鎖旋轉：BigWin 演出一開始就鎖\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(RT_EVENT.AWARD_IN_RT);\\n\\n            this.m_gameView.SetManualVisible( false );\\n            let lvl = 0;\\n            // SUPER >= 50x, MEGA >= 25x, BIG >= 10x\\n            if ( rate >= Game_Define.BigWinWinRule.SUPER_WIN_MIN )\\n            {\\n                lvl = 3; // SUPER\\n            }\\n            else if ( rate >= Game_Define.BigWinWinRule.MEGA_WIN_MIN )\\n            {\\n                lvl = 2; // MEGA\\n            }\\n            else\\n            {\\n                lvl = 1; // BIG\\n            }\\n\\n            this.m_gameView.ShowBigWin( winValue, lvl );\\n            this.m_gameView.FadeBgmOut();\\n\\n            newBottombarManager.SetSpinState( SlotBottomBarState.GET_AWARD_NO_AUTO );\\n\\n            // 0.5s 延遲保護：防止玩家太快跳過看不到動畫\\n            this.m_gameView.CanStopBigWin = false;\\n            Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, 0.5 ).then( () =>\\n            {\\n                this.m_gameView.CanStopBigWin = true;\\n                if ( newBottombarManager.IsAutoSpin )\\n                {\\n                    newBottombarManager.SetSpinState( SlotBottomBarState.CLICK_AUTOPLAY_HARDSTOP );\\n                }\\n                else\\n                {\\n                    newBottombarManager.SetSpinState( SlotBottomBarState.START_SPIN );\\n                }\\n            } );\\n        }\\n        newBottombarManager.SetWinValueWithCheck( { maxWin: totalWin, value: this.m_gameView.AccumulatedWin + this.m_gameView.RoundWin } );\\n    }\\n\\n    \\n\\n    /**@ch 取得Scatter中獎位置\\n     * @returns Scatter中獎位置\\n     */\\n    private GetScatterPositions(): number[] {\\n        let scatterPositions: number[] = [];\\n       \\n        if (this.m_currentPlateInfo.FeaturePosQueue.length > 0) {\\n            const featurePosQueue = this.m_currentPlateInfo.FeaturePosQueue[FeaturePosQueueType.Scatter];\\n            for (let position of featurePosQueue.Data) {\\n                scatterPositions.push(position);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return scatterPositions;\\n    }\\n\\n    \\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設定Reel黑幕顯示\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetReelBlackMaskShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        eventManager.Dispatch(isShow ? REEL_UI_MANAGER_EVENT.SHOW_BLACK_MASK : REEL_UI_MANAGER_EVENT.HIDE_BLACK_MASK);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 暫停背景音樂\\n     */\\n    private PauseBgm() {\\n        // 暫停背景音樂\\n        if (this.m_gameView.IsFreeGame) {\\n            this.m_gameView.PauseFreeGameBgm();\\n        }\\n        else {\\n            this.m_gameView.PauseMainGameBgm();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 恢復背景音樂\\n     */\\n    private ResumeBgm() {\\n        // 恢復背景音樂\\n        if (this.m_gameView.IsFreeGame) {\\n            this.m_gameView.ResumeFreeGameBgm();\\n        }\\n        else {\\n            this.m_gameView.ResumeMainGameBgm();\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    \\n    \\n    /**\\n     * @ch 表演變換Wild Symbol效果\\n     * @param featureWildData 變換Wild Symbol資料\\n     */\\n    \\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 表演Bingo Combo音效\\n     * @param comboCount Combo數量\\n     */\\n    private PlayBingoComboSound(comboCount: number) {\\n        // 假如小於最小值則不播放\\n        if (comboCount < Game_Define.BINGO_COMBO_MIN_COUNT) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        // 假如大於最大值則播放最大值\\n        if (comboCount > Game_Define.BINGO_COMBO_MAX_COUNT) {\\n            comboCount = Game_Define.BINGO_COMBO_MAX_COUNT;\\n        }\\n\\n        AudioManager.Play(AudioManager.AudioClips[`Bingo_Combo0${comboCount}`]);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 表演MaxFlag MessageBox\\n     */\\n    private async PlayMaxFlagMessageBox() : Promise<void> {\\n        log(\\\"PlayMaxFlagMessageBox\\\");\\n        return new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            msgBoxManager.ShowMessageBox(\\n                Define.StringKey.MSGBOX_MAX_REWARD,\\n                Define.StringKey.MSGBOX_TITLE_SYSTEM_INFO,\\n                () => {\\n                    resolve();\\n                }\\n            );\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\",\"numLines\":242,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":242}}"</outcome>

public OnEnter()\\n    {\\n\\n        log( \\\"OnEnter State : ROUND_END\\\" );\\n        const isNoWin = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo.RoundWin === 0;\\n\\n        // 不是FG的話要歸零\\n        if \\n\\n        this.m_gameView.CanSpaceStop = false;\\n        this.m_processTick = 0;\\n        this.m_gameView.RetryRoundEnd();\\n\\n        // 轉輪節奏模組：海盜女王\\n        let tempoModule =                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess( dt: number )\\n    {\\n        this.m_processTick = tools.strip( this.m_processTick - dt );\\n        if (
